analysis.consistency: Consistent with general D&D 5e spellcasting rules, where classes are granted the ability to use a focus.
analysis.quality: High quality. It is a very straightforward feature defining standard class proficiency.

mechanics.effect: Allows the Warlock to substitute an arcane focus for material components that lack a specified gold cost when casting spells. This is a standard class feature for most full casters.
mechanics.balance_impact: Neutral/Standard. Does not grant extra power, merely convenience, aligning with expectations for this class.

analysis.notes: This feature is essentially boilerplate for a spellcasting class, confirming the standard rules application for Warlocks.
